_meta.author: scorecard-refine-national cron (Claude opus-4-7)
_meta.note: CA federal House closer — CA-13 four-way (Javier Lopez LOST primary 3rd-place secular McClintock/LaMalfa-backed; John Duarte DECLINED 2026 reelection — set to FORMER + most heterodox R in CA House delegation 118th Congress self-declared pro-choice + ONLY R against Rosendale TRICARE trans-surgery ban + one of two Rs against HR 2 Secure the Border Act + DACA / Farm Worker Modernization sponsor; Kevin Lincoln II ADVANCED to general — Trump-endorsed Dec 2025 + PASTOR at LifeSong Church Stockton + 2024 lost CA-09; Vin Kruttiventi LOST primary 3rd-place Hindu Americans4Hindus-affiliated A5 CEO Indian-American w/ HARD 2A); plus CA-14 Melissa Hernandez (Swalwell-vacancy after Swalwell resigned April 14 2026 amid misconduct allegations during suspended Gov bid — BART Board President / former Dublin Mayor / cross-direction mild TRUE on transit-policing pro-sworn-officer posture + DSA+NewDem dual endorsement). Mike Thompson CA-4 SKIPPED 6th time (3-way slug collision w/ MS state senator + KS state senator; needs slug-disambig fix before refinement).

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-13 (2026 R Candidate · Mayor of Ceres · LOST June 2 primary 3rd-place · Gray + Lincoln advanced)

profile.religion: Not publicly stated (no Christian profession on campaign materials — campaign tagline 'Coach. Mayor. Conservative. American.' is secular populist framing)
profile.background: Javier B. Lopez, born October 8, 1983, Los Angeles; raised in Ceres CA since age 5. Parents immigrated from Jalisco, Mexico (late 1970s); mother picked strawberries; family lived in the Ceres Labor Camp. Ceres High School diploma; no college listed. 20 years in fire-suppression industry (programmer / lead technician); coach; small-business owner. Elected to Ceres City Council Dec 2020; elected Mayor of Ceres Nov 2020 (defeated 3-term incumbent); re-elected Nov 2024 (44.15% / 6,195 votes — defeated former Rep. Gary Condit). FEC committee 'LOPEZ FOR THE VALLEY' (C00901439) filed April 3, 2025; raised $146K / spent $145K; $983 COH + $21K debt as of 3/31/2026 — under-resourced. Endorsed by Reps. Tom McClintock + Doug LaMalfa (both Freedom Caucus / hard-conservative imprimatur) and former CA SecState Bill Jones.

javier-lopez-ca-13.notes_set: STATUS FIX: LOST June 2, 2026 CA-13 top-two primary (3rd place); Gray (D, ~42%) + Lincoln (R, ~28%) advanced to November. HARD-evidence catches: TRUE on family_child_sovereignty Q0 (explicit 'school choice' on Issues page); TRUE on border_immigration Q0 ('strong, secure borders and fully enforcing immigration laws'); TRUE on biblical_marriage Q2 ('Women's Sports: protect female athletes' — implicit immutable-sex eligibility). HARD-FALSE catches (cross-party heterodoxy from an R): FALSE on border_immigration Q1 (explicit support for 'expanding the H-2A visa program and creating a legal pathway to citizenship' — opposite of mandatory deportation, the discordant amnesty-adjacent position); sanctity_of_life cells held NULL (zero abortion / personhood / PP mention on Issues page despite R label — high-value silent gap flagged but not scoreable as FALSE without contrary evidence); christian_liberty cells held NULL (Lopez's own non-profession ≠ opposing the public-profession right). McClintock + LaMalfa endorsement is the strongest conservative-bona-fides signal in the file but does not single-issue substitute for cell evidence.

2.note: Issues page: 'Women's Sports: protect female athletes' — implicit sex-based athletic eligibility, aligned with affirming biological sex as immutable. Score SOFT; only marriage-rubric cell with explicit campaign material.

0.note: Issues page: 'Parents Rights: school choice, stronger core education, and expanded vocational training' — explicit school-choice support.
Issues page: 'strong, secure borders and fully enforcing immigration laws' — pro-border-enforcement.

1.note: Same Issues page also supports 'expanding the H-2A visa program and creating a legal pathway to citizenship' — opposite of mandatory deportation of all illegal aliens (Q1's bar). CROSS-PARTY heterodoxy from an R.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-13 (118th Congress 2023-2025 · LOST 2024 to Gray by 187 votes · DECLINED 2026 reelection · endorsed Lopez then Lincoln)

profile.religion: Episcopalian (Pew 'Faith on the Hill' 118th Congress — denominational, no testimonial Christian profession on campaign materials)
profile.background: John Scott Duarte, born September 9, 1966, Modesto CA; Portuguese-American. Wife Alexandra (m. 1996); 4 children. Lives on pistachio/almond farm in rural Stanislaus County. BA Finance, San Diego State (1989); MBA, University of the Pacific (Eberhardt). CEO/President of Duarte Nursery (Hughson) since 2007 — largest permanent crop nursery in the world per industry sources. 2017 EPA wetlands settlement: $2.8M Clean Water Act fine for plowing wheat through Tehama County vernal pools — became a national property-rights / regulatory-pushback advocate. Won open CA-13 seat 2022 by 564 votes (last U.S. House race called nationally that cycle); LOST 2024 reelection to Adam Gray (D) by 187 votes (last race called Dec 4 2024). DECLINED to run for 2026 reelection; endorsed Javier Lopez (R, Mayor of Ceres) in 2026 R primary, then switched endorsement to Kevin Lincoln II when Lopez withdrew. Self-described in Sept 2023 Fresnoland interview: 'I'll stand against the woke. I'll stand against the ultra-conservatives.'

john-duarte.notes_set: STATUS FIX: DECLINED 2026 reelection (set to status: former); endorsed Lopez then Lincoln after Lopez withdrew. SCORING from REAL 118th Congress voting record (he was a sitting Rep — not a social-media-only score). Among the most HETERODOX Republicans in the 119th-era House from CA; record stacks cross-direction FALSES on the conservative axis: HARD-FALSE on sanctity_of_life Q0/Q1 (self-identified 'pro-choice Republican' on the record — Sacramento Bee Sept 18 2024; opposes federal abortion ban, says abortion 'should be left to the states'). HARD-FALSE on biblical_marriage Q2/Q4 (SOLE Republican to vote NO on Rosendale HAmdt 223 to NDAA FY24, July 13 2023, which would have barred TRICARE coverage of gender-affirmation surgeries / hormones — single-R defection on the central transgender-medical-funding vote of the Congress). HARD-FALSE on border_immigration Q0/Q1/Q3 (one of only TWO Republicans to vote NO on HR 2 Secure the Border Act May 2023; called E-Verify 'devastating for farmers'; sponsored Farm Worker Modernization Act = bipartisan ag-worker amnesty/legalization vehicle; supports DACA). Also voted NO on Jackson HAmdt 222 to NDAA FY24 (DoD abortion-travel reimbursement bar) — one of two Rs. Of the CA House R delegation he was the weakest on life / sexuality / border. Foreign policy was standard pro-Israel (YES on H.Res. 771 Oct 25 2023). Episcopalian (Pew classification) — no public Christian profession statement located in any campaign material. Heritage Action lifetime: agent flagged bioguide-ID confusion (D000631 vs D000632); score noted in notes but not committed to a numeric cell. Retained on scorecard as historical/former record (he held office 2023-2025).

0.note: Self-identified 'pro-choice Republican' on the record (Sacramento Bee Brassil, Sept 18 2024); 'should be left to the states' frame is opposite of conception-personhood. HARD evidence.

1.note: Self-declared pro-choice + voted NO on Jackson HAmdt 222 to NDAA FY24 (one of two Rs) which would have barred DoD abortion-travel reimbursement — opposite of abolition. HARD evidence.

2.note: ONLY REPUBLICAN to vote NO on Rosendale HAmdt 223 to NDAA FY24 (July 13 2023) barring TRICARE coverage of gender-affirmation surgeries / hormones — single-R defection on the central transgender-medical-funding vote of the Congress. HARDEST EVIDENCE of all CA-13 cells, opposite of rejecting transgender ideology.

4.note: Same Rosendale TRICARE vote — opposing the bar = supporting taxpayer-funded gender medicine in DoD = LGBTQ+ promotion in military policy.

0.note: One of only TWO House Republicans to vote NO on HR 2 Secure the Border Act May 2023 (the core border-buildup vehicle) — opposite of supporting border-enforcement buildup. HARD.

1.note: Sponsored Farm Worker Modernization Act = bipartisan ag-worker amnesty/legalization vehicle; supports DACA — opposite of mandatory deportation including those who entered as minors. HARD.

3.note: Publicly called E-Verify 'devastating for farmers' — opposite of supporting mandatory E-Verify for employment. HARD.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-13 (2026 R Candidate · former Stockton Mayor 2021-2025 · Trump-endorsed Dec 2025 · ADVANCED to November general vs Gray)

profile.religion: Christian — Executive Administrative Pastor at LifeSong Church (Stockton CA), joined full-time 2013; resigned pastoral role to take office as Mayor of Stockton (publicly identifies in campaign material as 'Marine, Pastor, Mayor')
profile.background: Kevin Jeffery Lincoln II, born October 28, 1980, Stockton CA. Mexican-American mother + African-American father. U.S. Marine 2001+; served Marine One presidential helicopter squadron HMX-1 under President G.W. Bush. Wife Bonnie + two children. Joined LifeSong Church (Stockton) full-time in 2013 as Executive Administrative Pastor; resigned pastoral role to serve as Mayor of Stockton (Jan 2021–Jan 2025) — first Republican mayor of Stockton in ~15 years, defeated incumbent Michael Tubbs (D) in 2020. DID NOT seek mayoral reelection 2024 — instead ran CA-09 against Rep. Josh Harder (D) and LOST. ADVANCED from June 2, 2026 CA-13 top-two primary as the #2 finisher (14,591 votes / 29.1%); faces incumbent Adam Gray (D, 40.9%) in November. TRUMP ENDORSEMENT (Truth Social, December 2025): 'Kevin Lincoln has my Complete and Total Endorsement – HE WILL NEVER LET YOU DOWN!'

kevin-lincoln-ii.notes_set: STATUS FIX: ADVANCED to November general — candidacy_status set to general_candidate (was primary_candidate). HIGH-VISIBILITY profile — pastor + Marine + Trump-endorsed. HARD-TRUE catches: biblical_marriage Q2 + Q4 (Issues page opposes 'policies that allow men into women's bathrooms and support gender transition surgeries for children' + anti-DEI K-12); family_child_sovereignty Q1 (opposing gender-transition surgeries for children is stronger than the parental-notification-on-medical-intervention rubric bar); family_child_sovereignty Q2 (anti-DEI/'woke agenda' in valley schools); border_immigration Q0 (Issues: 'secure the border, enforce our immigration laws, restore law-and-order'); border_immigration Q1 (Stocktonia 2025-07-22: 'If you're in this country illegally, then you shouldn't be here' — return home + re-enter legally = aligned with mandatory deportation); christian_liberty Q0 (his own X-bio profession 'I've led a life of service as a Marine, a Pastor, and as Mayor of Stockton' + Wikipedia/Stocktonia confirmation of pastoral role = unambiguous affirmation of the public-profession-of-Christ right). HARD-CROSS-DIRECTION (HETERODOXY) catch on sanctity_of_life Q1: self-identifies as 'pro-life' (TRUE SOFT Q0) BUT explicit 'I am not going to Washington to support a federal abortion ban' + rape/incest/health-of-mother exceptions — defers to states. Score Q1 abolition FALSE (the rubric bar is abortion abolition, not state-rights-only pro-life). Q3 chem-abortion, Q4 PP-funding, election_integrity, foreign_policy_restraint, self_defense, economic_stewardship, industry_capture all NULL — no campaign-site evidence. NRA / SBA Pro-Life / Heritage / CRP formal endorsements not located in the search window — flagged for follow-up sweep.

0.note: Self-identified 'pro-life' on the record (general statement, SOFT — doesn't speak to conception-personhood specifically but is on the affirming side of the spectrum).

1.note: Explicit statement: 'I am not going to Washington to support a federal abortion ban' + rape/incest/health-of-mother exceptions; says 'California is a pro-choice state' — defers to states. Opposite of the Q1 abortion-abolition rubric bar. CROSS-DIRECTION heterodoxy flag.

2.note: Issues page: opposes 'policies that allow men into women's bathrooms and support gender transition surgeries for children' — explicit rejection of transgender ideology + affirmation of biological sex as immutable. HARD.

4.note: Same Issues page line + 'Keeping the woke DEI agenda out of the valley' — opposes LGBTQ+ promotion in public schools / policy. HARD.

1.note: Opposing 'gender transition surgeries for children' on the Issues page is a stronger statement than parental-notification — directly opposes the gender-related medical intervention itself (which subsumes the notification/consent rubric bar). HARD.

2.note: Issues page: 'Keeping the woke DEI agenda out of the valley' applied to schools — opposes SOGI/CRT-aligned curricula. HARD.

0.note: Issues page: 'Kevin Lincoln will always fight to secure the border, enforce our immigration laws, and restore law-and-order' — pro-border-enforcement buildup. HARD.

1.note: Stocktonia 2025-07-22 direct quote: 'If you're in this country illegally, then you shouldn't be here' — return to home country, re-enter legally. Aligned with mandatory deportation of all illegal aliens. HARD.

0.note: His own X-bio profession 'I've led a life of service as a Marine, a Pastor, and as Mayor of Stockton' + Wikipedia + Stocktonia confirmation he served as Executive Administrative Pastor at LifeSong Church Stockton — public Christian profession in office and on the campaign is unambiguous affirmation of the right to publicly profess Christ. HARD.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-13 (2026 R Candidate · A5 consulting CEO · LOST June 2 primary 3rd-place · 2024 also LOST CA-14 primary)

profile.religion: Hindu cultural affiliation (Americans 4 Hindus per public bio) — no Christian profession on campaign materials; no faith/God/church/prayer references
profile.background: Vinay 'Vin' Kruttiventi, first-generation legal immigrant born Hyderabad, India. BA Osmania University 1996. Resides Wilton, CA (Sacramento County — likely outside CA-13 proper). CEO of A5, a global business / technology consulting firm; chair of the Vinay Kruttiventi Foundation. Married, two daughters. Grandfather described as having worked alongside Gandhi. Previously LOST 2024 CA-14 R primary. FEC ID H4CA14093, committee C00839944. Endorsements claimed: CPAC, San Joaquin / Merced / Madera County Young Republicans (per Los Banos Enterprise sponsored content). No SBA Pro-Life, NRA-PVF, House Freedom Fund, or church/faith endorsements located. 2024 iVoterGuide rated 'Conservative — Conditional, 55' (did NOT complete the survey).

vin-kruttiventi.notes_set: STATUS FIX: LOST June 2, 2026 CA-13 top-two primary (3rd place ~16.6% / 8,332 votes); Gray (D) + Lincoln (R) advanced. HARD-TRUE catches: self_defense Q1 (Priorities page verbatim: 'So-called assault rifles ban, magazine capacity restrictions, and gun free zones will all be a thing of the past' — directly opposite of the rubric's listed bans); border_immigration Q0 (Priorities: 'Secure Our Southern Border: By enforcing our immigration laws' + 'physically secure the southern border'). HARD-FALSE cross-party catch: border_immigration Q1 (same border plank includes 'creating a realistic, accessible, and legal pathway to citizenship' — opposite of mandatory deportation, heterodox R amnesty-adjacent posture, parallel to Lopez's H-2A line). SOFT TRUE candidates not committed: voter ID + parental rights (third-party endorsement-page summaries, not his direct quotes — not citable). Sanctity_of_life / biblical_marriage / christian_liberty cells held NULL (campaign silent — high-value silent gap for an R but not scoreable as FALSE without contrary evidence). 2024 prior CA-14 loss + 2026 CA-13 loss = perennial under-resourced candidate.

0.note: Priorities page: 'Secure Our Southern Border: By enforcing our immigration laws' + 'physically secure the southern border' — pro-border-enforcement buildup. HARD.

1.note: Same Priorities page adds 'creating a realistic, accessible, and legal pathway to citizenship' — opposite of mandatory deportation. CROSS-PARTY heterodoxy from an R.

Priorities page verbatim: 'So-called assault rifles ban, magazine capacity restrictions, and gun free zones will all be a thing of the past' — directly opposite of red-flag/AWB/mag-limit/registry bans listed in Q1. HARD.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-14 (2026 D Candidate · Swalwell-vacancy after his April 2026 resignation · BART Board President / former Dublin Mayor · provisional 2nd in June 2 top-two pending call + on June 16 special-election ballot)

profile.background: Melissa Hernández, Dublin CA. Latina; first Latina mayor of Dublin; first Latina BART director. Day job: Director of healthcare services for Alameda County Supervisor David Haubert. Dublin City Council ~8 years; Dublin Mayor 2020-June 2024. BART Board of Directors District 5: appointed May 23, 2024 to fill a vacancy; elected November 2024; unanimously elected BART Board President for 2026 (announced December 18, 2025). Also chaired Valley Link, LAVTA, Alameda CTC Finance. Filed for CA-14 after Rep. Eric Swalwell resigned April 14, 2026 amid sexual-misconduct allegations that broke during his suspended 2026 California gubernatorial campaign. Ran in the June 2, 2026 CA-14 top-two primary AND on the separate June 16, 2026 special-election ballot (Newsom proclamation 2026-04-14).

melissa-hernandez-ca-14.notes_set: STATUS: provisional 2nd in June 2 top-two (10,933 votes / 16.09%) behind State Sen. Aisha Wahab (D, 34.30%) with Republicans Wendy Huang (15.96%) + Dena Maldonado (14.8%) within ~900 votes — top-two not officially called as of 2026-06-04, so candidacy_status held at primary_candidate; upgrade to general_candidate when call confirmed. HARD-FALSE catches: sanctity_of_life Q0/Q1 (Issues page: 'restore reproductive freedom by supporting legislation like the Women's Health Protection Act' — WHPA codifies pre-viability abortion right, opposite of conception personhood + abolition); border_immigration Q0/Q1 (Issues page: 'eliminate ICE, deport criminals only, pathways for DREAMers and undocumented immigrants' — opposite of border-buildup and mandatory deportation). NOTABLY ABSENT from her endorsements page: Planned Parenthood Action Fund, EMILY's List, Equality California, LGBTQ Victory Fund, Giffords, J Street, AIPAC — sanctity_of_life Q4 (PP/abortion-industry PAC funding) held NULL because no specific issue-PAC endorsement found, and biblical_marriage cells held NULL (no specific marriage/LGBT statement). DSA + NewDem Action Fund + CHC BOLD PAC + Elect Democratic Women + Alameda Co. Firefighters dual endorsement = ideologically broad coalition (DSA on the left + NewDem in the center). CROSS-DIRECTION SOFT TRUE catch on transit-policing (would map to public_justice at local/state tier, but that category is N/A at federal tier per rubric — noted in narrative only): as BART Board President she explicitly endorses 'sworn officers AND unarmed staff working together' + 'well deployed uniformed personnel' alongside transit ambassadors, separating her from the ambassador-only progressive flank. Foreign-policy / Israel / LGBT / guns / parental-rights / religious-liberty cells all NULL — Issues page deliberately narrow.

0.note: Issues page: 'restore reproductive freedom by supporting legislation like the Women's Health Protection Act' — WHPA codifies pre-viability abortion right, opposite of conception personhood. HARD.

1.note: Same WHPA-support plank = opposite of abortion abolition (the federal codification of abortion rights is the inverse). HARD.

0.note: Issues page: 'eliminate ICE' — opposite of supporting border-enforcement build-up and active military border presence. HARD.

1.note: Issues page: 'pathways for DREAMers and undocumented immigrants' — opposite of mandatory deportation of all illegal aliens including those who entered as minors. HARD.
